justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all temporal expressions, including 'Monday next week' and subsequent adjustments to time and day.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively proposed alternative times and days when the initial requests were unavailable, although it could have offered more than one alternative at a time.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently handled the conversation, understanding all user requests without needing clarification or making redundant API calls.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was smooth and professional, with the agent successfully booking the appointment without any issues or jargon.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent maintained full context and intelligently expanded its search for available slots after initial rejections, leading to a successful booking.
